Description: Long-read sequencing (LRS) is a powerful tool for detecting structural variants (SVs), which are major causes of genetic diseases. However, the application of trio-based analysis to LRS data remains challenging due to the complexity of merging and comparing SVs across individuals. Description: Wastewater-based epidemiology (WBE) provides an efficient, population-wide tool for monitoring SARS-CoV-2 transmission and evolution, overcoming limitations of clinical testing. Description: Tea, a nutritionally and culturally vital beverage, demands reliable quality grading and cultivar authentication, particularly for high-value functional varieties.
